name: tinyassets-universe-server
description: TinyAssets — build, run, and steer custom AI agent workflows inside shared universes. Also: custom AI builder, universe builder, agent workflow platform.
long_description: TinyAssets packages a multi-universe control plane as a local MCP Bundle. Users design agent workflows as graphs of nodes and run autonomous daemons against them inside named universes. Tiny is the acting intelligence users talk to; TinyAssets is the platform and distribution brand. Connect by natural phrases such as 'TinyAssets', 'Tiny', 'custom AI builder', 'universe builder', or 'my AI builder connector'.

tools.name: universe
tools.description: Inspect, read, and modify universe state through the coarse-grained TinyAssets Server control tool.

tools.name: extensions
tools.description: Register, inspect, approve, disable, and remove custom workflow graph nodes.

tinyassets_data_dir.title: TinyAssets Data Directory
tinyassets_data_dir.description: Select the directory that contains your universe folders, such as this repo's output directory.

default_universe.title: Default Universe
default_universe.description: Optional universe ID to use when the client does not pass one explicitly.
